revision.text:
{{神社 |名称= 横田神社 |画像= |所在地= [[徳島県]][[三好郡]][[東みよし町]]加茂字中村 |位置= |祭神= [[市杵島姫命]] |社格= 旧無格社 |創建= 不詳 |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |}} '''横田神社'''（よこたじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[東みよし町]]にある[[神社]]である。
== 歴史 == 創建年は不詳。
[[明治]]の神社明細帳によると弁財天とも称しており、元々は200m四方もあった大きな境内を有し、周囲に池をめぐらしていたと伝わる。[[1911年]]（[[明治]]44年）に、[[鴨神社 (東みよし町)|鴨神社]]に合祀されたが、[[1922年]]（[[大正]]11年）に氏子によって再び現社地に小祠が建立された<ref>{{cite web|url=https://genbu.net/data/awa2/yokota_title.htm|title=横田神社|publisher=玄松子の記憶|accessdate=2021-5-14}}</ref>。
式内社・横田神社と考えられる古社で、『[[阿波志]]』には「横田祠延喜式小祀と為す。今廃す鴨村横田に存す」とある。
== 祭神 == * [[市杵島姫命]]
== 交通 == * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[徳島線]]「[[阿波加茂駅]]」より徒歩で約10分。
== 脚注 == <references />
{{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:よこたしんしや}} [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:東みよし町]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]]

== 祭神 == * [[市杵島姫命]]

{{nihongo|'''Yokota Shrine'''|横田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|de|Shintō-Schrein|zh|神社|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|ru|Дзиндзя|WD=Q845945}}

{{nihongo|'''Yokota Shrine'''|横田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{Expand Japanese|横田神社 (東みよし町)}}

{{Infobox religious building

{{nihongo|'''Yokota Shrine'''|横田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{Expand Japanese|横田神社 (東みよし町)}}

{{Infobox religious building

{{nihongo|'''Yokota Shrine'''|横田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{Expand Japanese|横田神社 (東みよし町)}}

{{Infobox religious building

| mapframe = yes

{{nihongo|'''Yokota Shrine'''|横田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Yokota Shrine'''|横田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

revision.comment: 7 revisions imported
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称= 横田神社 |画像= [[File:Yokota-jinja Hugashitsurugi city.jpg|250px]] |所在地= [[徳島県]][[三好郡]][[東みよし町]]加茂字中村 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= [[市杵島姫命]] |社格= 旧無格社 |創建= 不詳 |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=横田神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''横田神社'''（よこたじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[東みよし町]]にある[[神社]]である。
== 歴史 == 創建年は不詳。
[[明治]]の神社明細帳によると弁財天とも称しており、元々は200m四方もあった大きな境内を有し、周囲に池をめぐらしていたと伝わる。[[1911年]]（[[明治]]44年）に、[[鴨神社 (東みよし町)|鴨神社]]に合祀されたが、[[1922年]]（[[大正]]11年）に氏子によって再び現社地に小祠が建立された<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://genbu.net/data/awa2/yokota_title.htm|title=横田神社|publisher=玄松子の記憶|accessdate=2021-05-14}}</ref>。
式内社・横田神社と考えられる古社で、『[[阿波志]]』には「横田祠延喜式小祀と為す。今廃す鴨村横田に存す」とある。
== 祭神 == * [[市杵島姫命]]
== 交通 == * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[徳島線]]「[[阿波加茂駅]]」より徒歩で約10分。
== 脚注 == <references />
{{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:よこたしんしや}} [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:東みよし町の建築物]] [[Category:東みよし町の歴史]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[横田神社 (東みよし町)]] to [[Yokota Shrine]] without leaving a redirect: Merging Japanese Wikipedia import with English content
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称= 横田神社 |画像= [[File:Yokota-jinja Hugashitsurugi city.jpg|250px]] |所在地= [[徳島県]][[三好郡]][[東みよし町]]加茂字中村 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= [[市杵島姫命]] |社格= 旧無格社 |創建= 不詳 |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=横田神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''横田神社'''（よこたじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[東みよし町]]にある[[神社]]である。
== 歴史 == 創建年は不詳。
[[明治]]の神社明細帳によると弁財天とも称しており、元々は200m四方もあった大きな境内を有し、周囲に池をめぐらしていたと伝わる。[[1911年]]（[[明治]]44年）に、[[鴨神社 (東みよし町)|鴨神社]]に合祀されたが、[[1922年]]（[[大正]]11年）に氏子によって再び現社地に小祠が建立された<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://genbu.net/data/awa2/yokota_title.htm|title=横田神社|publisher=玄松子の記憶|accessdate=2021-05-14}}</ref>。
式内社・横田神社と考えられる古社で、『[[阿波志]]』には「横田祠延喜式小祀と為す。今廃す鴨村横田に存す」とある。
== 祭神 == * [[市杵島姫命]]
== 交通 == * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[徳島線]]「[[阿波加茂駅]]」より徒歩で約10分。
== 脚注 == <references />
{{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:よこたしんしや}} [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:東みよし町の建築物]] [[Category:東みよし町の歴史]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]]

[[JA:横田神社 (東みよし町)]]
{{wikidata link|Q106852705}} [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]]
{{translated page|ja|横田神社 (東みよし町)|version=107356408|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]]
== Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称= 横田神社 |画像= [[File:Yokota-jinja Hugashitsurugi city.jpg|250px]] |所在地= [[徳島県]][[三好郡]][[東みよし町]]加茂字中村 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= [[市杵島姫命]] |社格= 旧無格社 |創建= 不詳 |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=横田神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''横田神社'''（よこたじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[東みよし町]]にある[[神社]]である。
== 歴史 == 創建年は不詳。
[[明治]]の神社明細帳によると弁財天とも称しており、元々は200m四方もあった大きな境内を有し、周囲に池をめぐらしていたと伝わる。[[1911年]]（[[明治]]44年）に、[[鴨神社 (東みよし町)|鴨神社]]に合祀されたが、[[1922年]]（[[大正]]11年）に氏子によって再び現社地に小祠が建立された<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://genbu.net/data/awa2/yokota_title.htm|title=横田神社|publisher=玄松子の記憶|accessdate=2021-05-14}}</ref>。
式内社・横田神社と考えられる古社で、『[[阿波志]]』には「横田祠延喜式小祀と為す。今廃す鴨村横田に存す」とある。
== 祭神 == * [[市杵島姫命]]
== 交通 == * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[徳島線]]「[[阿波加茂駅]]」より徒歩で約10分。
== 脚注 == <references />
{{shinto-stub}} [[category:徳島県の神社]]
==End Japanese== [[Category:東みよし町の建築物]] [[Category:東みよし町の歴史]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]]

== Japanese content ==
{{出典の明記|date=2026-01}}
{{神社
|名称= 横田神社
|画像= [[File:Yokota-jinja Hugashitsurugi city.jpg|250px]]
|所在地= {{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|三好郡|Q1156031}}{{jalink|東みよし町|Q1206006}}加茂字中村
|位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}}
|祭神= {{jalink|市杵島姫命}}
|社格= 旧無格社
|創建= 不詳
|本殿= 
|別名= 
|例祭= 
|神事= 
|地図= {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=横田神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}}
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}}
}}
'''横田神社'''（よこたじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|東みよし町|Q1206006}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。

=== 歴史 ===
創建年は不詳。

{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}の神社明細帳によると弁財天とも称しており、元々は200m四方もあった大きな境内を有し、周囲に池をめぐらしていたと伝わる。{{jalink|1911年|Q2076}}（{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}44年）に、{{jalink|鴨神社 (東みよし町)||鴨神社}}に合祀されたが、{{jalink|1922年|Q2165}}（{{jalink|大正|Q329174}}11年）に氏子によって再び現社地に小祠が建立された。

式内社・横田神社と考えられる古社で、『{{jalink|阿波志|Q65291985}}』には「横田祠延喜式小祀と為す。今廃す鴨村横田に存す」とある。

=== 祭神 ===
* {{jalink|市杵島姫命}}

=== 交通 ===
* {{jalink|四国旅客鉄道|Q496531|JR}}{{jalink|徳島線|Q899310}}「{{jalink|阿波加茂駅|Q4829611}}」より徒歩で約10分。

=== 脚注 ===
<references />

{{shinto-stub}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:よこたしんしや}}

|神事=

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}}

'''横田神社'''（よこたじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|東みよし町|Q1206006}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。

=== 歴史 ===
創建年は不詳。

{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}の神社明細帳によると弁財天とも称しており、元々は200m四方もあった大きな境内を有し、周囲に池をめぐらしていたと伝わる。{{jalink|1911年|Q2076}}（{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}44年）に、{{jalink|鴨神社 (東みよし町)||鴨神社}}に合祀されたが、{{jalink|1922年|Q2165}}（{{jalink|大正|Q329174}}11年）に氏子によって再び現社地に小祠が建立された。

式内社・横田神社と考えられる古社で、『{{jalink|阿波志|Q65291985}}』には「横田祠延喜式小祀と為す。今廃す鴨村横田に存す」とある。

=== 祭神 ===
* {{jalink|市杵島姫命}}

=== 交通 ===
* {{jalink|四国旅客鉄道|Q496531|JR}}{{jalink|徳島線|Q899310}}「{{jalink|阿波加茂駅|Q4829611}}」より徒歩で約10分。

=== 脚注 ===
<references />

{{shinto-stub}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:よこたしんしや}}

'''横田神社'''（よこたじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|東みよし町|Q1206006}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。

=== 歴史 ===
創建年は不詳。

{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}の神社明細帳によると弁財天とも称しており、元々は200m四方もあった大きな境内を有し、周囲に池をめぐらしていたと伝わる。{{jalink|1911年|Q2076}}（{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}44年）に、{{jalink|鴨神社 (東みよし町)||鴨神社}}に合祀されたが、{{jalink|1922年|Q2165}}（{{jalink|大正|Q329174}}11年）に氏子によって再び現社地に小祠が建立された。

式内社・横田神社と考えられる古社で、『{{jalink|阿波志|Q65291985}}』には「横田祠延喜式小祀と為す。今廃す鴨村横田に存す」とある。

=== 祭神 ===
* {{jalink|市杵島姫命}}

=== 交通 ===
* {{jalink|四国旅客鉄道|Q496531|JR}}{{jalink|徳島線|Q899310}}「{{jalink|阿波加茂駅|Q4829611}}」より徒歩で約10分。

=== 脚注 ===

'''Yokota Shrine''' (よこたじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Higashimiyoshi|Q1206006}}, {{jalink|Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734}}.

=== History ===
The founding year is unknown.

According to Meiji-era shrine registers, it was also called Benzaiten. It is said that the precincts were originally large, about 200 m square, with a pond surrounding them. In 1911 (Meiji 44), it was merged into {{jalink|Kamo Shrine (Higashimiyoshi)||Kamo Shrine}}; in 1922 (Taishō 11), local parishioners built a small shrine again at the present site.

It is an old shrine considered to correspond to the Shikinaisha Yokota Shrine. The ''{{jalink|Awa-shi|Q65291985}}'' states: "Yokota no Hokora is the Engishiki small shrine. Now abolished, it remains in Yokota, Kamo Village."

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{jalink|Ichikishimahime no Mikoto}}

=== Access ===
* About 10 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Awa-Kamo Station|Q4829611}} on the {{jalink|Tokushima Line|Q899310}} of {{jalink|JR Shikoku|Q496531|JR}}.

=== Notes ===
<references />

'''Yokota Shrine''' (よこたじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Higashimiyoshi|Q1206006}}, {{jalink|Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734}}.

=== History ===
The founding year is unknown.

According to Meiji-era shrine registers, it was also called Benzaiten. It is said that the precincts were originally large, about 200 m square, with a pond surrounding them. In 1911 (Meiji 44), it was merged into {{jalink|Kamo Shrine (Higashimiyoshi)||Kamo Shrine}}; in 1922 (Taishō 11), local parishioners built a small shrine again at the present site.

It is an old shrine considered to correspond to the Shikinaisha Yokota Shrine. The ''{{jalink|Awa-shi|Q65291985}}'' states: "Yokota no Hokora is the Engishiki small shrine. Now abolished, it remains in Yokota, Kamo Village."

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{jalink|Ichikishimahime no Mikoto}}

=== Access ===
* About 10 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Awa-Kamo Station|Q4829611}} on the {{jalink|Tokushima Line|Q899310}} of {{jalink|JR Shikoku|Q496531|JR}}.

=== Notes ===
<references />

{{shinto-stub}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:よこたしんしや}}

'''Yokota Shrine''' (よこたじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Higashimiyoshi|Q1206006}}, {{jalink|Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734}}.

=== History ===
The founding year is unknown.

According to Meiji-era shrine registers, it was also called Benzaiten. It is said that the precincts were originally large, about 200 m square, with a pond surrounding them. In 1911 (Meiji 44), it was merged into {{jalink|Kamo Shrine (Higashimiyoshi)||Kamo Shrine}}; in 1922 (Taishō 11), local parishioners built a small shrine again at the present site.

It is an old shrine considered to correspond to the Shikinaisha Yokota Shrine. The ''{{jalink|Awa-shi|Q65291985}}'' states: "Yokota no Hokora is the Engishiki small shrine. Now abolished, it remains in Yokota, Kamo Village."

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{jalink|Ichikishimahime no Mikoto}}

=== Access ===
* About 10 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Awa-Kamo Station|Q4829611}} on the {{jalink|Tokushima Line|Q899310}} of {{jalink|JR Shikoku|Q496531|JR}}.

=== Notes ===
<references />

'''Yokota Shrine''' (よこたじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Higashimiyoshi|Q1206006|WD=Q1206006}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734}}.

=== History ===
The founding year is unknown.

According to Meiji-era shrine registers, it was also called Benzaiten. It is said that the precincts were originally large, about 200 m square, with a pond surrounding them. In 1911 (Meiji 44), it was merged into {{ill|lt=Kamo Shrine (Higashimiyoshi)||WD=|lt=Kamo Shrine}}; in 1922 (Taishō 11), local parishioners built a small shrine again at the present site.

It is an old shrine considered to correspond to the Shikinaisha Yokota Shrine. The ''{{ill|lt=Awa-shi|Q65291985|WD=Q65291985}}'' states: "Yokota no Hokora is the Engishiki small shrine. Now abolished, it remains in Yokota, Kamo Village."

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ichikishimahime no Mikoto|UNKNOWN}}

=== Access ===
* About 10 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Awa-Kamo Station|Q4829611|WD=Q4829611}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Line|Q899310|WD=Q899310}} of {{ill|lt=JR Shikoku|Q496531|WD=Q496531|lt=JR}}.

=== Notes ===
<references />

'''Yokota Shrine''' (よこたじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Higashimiyoshi|Q1206006|WD=Q1206006}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734}}.

=== History ===
The founding year is unknown.

According to Meiji-era shrine registers, it was also called Benzaiten. It is said that the precincts were originally large, about 200 m square, with a pond surrounding them. In 1911 (Meiji 44), it was merged into {{ill|lt=Kamo Shrine (Higashimiyoshi)|UNKNOWN|lt=Kamo Shrine}}; in 1922 (Taishō 11), local parishioners built a small shrine again at the present site.

It is an old shrine considered to correspond to the Shikinaisha Yokota Shrine. The ''{{ill|lt=Awa-shi|Q65291985|WD=Q65291985}}'' states: "Yokota no Hokora is the Engishiki small shrine. Now abolished, it remains in Yokota, Kamo Village."

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ichikishimahime no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}

=== Access ===
* About 10 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Awa-Kamo Station|Q4829611|WD=Q4829611}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Line|Q899310|WD=Q899310}} of {{ill|lt=JR Shikoku|Q496531|WD=Q496531|lt=JR}}.

=== Notes ===

'''Yokota Shrine''' (よこたじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Higashimiyoshi|Q1206006|WD=Q1206006|1=Higashimiyoshi}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}.

=== History ===
The founding year is unknown.

According to Meiji-era shrine registers, it was also called Benzaiten. It is said that the precincts were originally large, about 200 m square, with a pond surrounding them. In 1911 (Meiji 44), it was merged into {{ill|lt=Kamo Shrine (Higashimiyoshi)|UNKNOWN|lt=Kamo Shrine}}; in 1922 (Taishō 11), local parishioners built a small shrine again at the present site.

It is an old shrine considered to correspond to the Shikinaisha Yokota Shrine. The ''{{ill|lt=Awa-shi|Q65291985|WD=Q65291985|1=Awa-shi}}'' states: "Yokota no Hokora is the Engishiki small shrine. Now abolished, it remains in Yokota, Kamo Village."

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ichikishimahime no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}

=== Access ===
* About 10 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Awa-Kamo Station|Q4829611|WD=Q4829611|1=Awa-Kamo Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Line|Q899310|WD=Q899310|1=Tokushima Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR Shikoku|Q496531|WD=Q496531|lt=JR|1=Shikoku Railway Company}}.

'''Yokota Shrine''' (よこたじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Higashimiyoshi|Q1206006|WD=Q1206006|1=Higashimiyoshi}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}.

=== History ===
The founding year is unknown.

According to Meiji-era shrine registers, it was also called Benzaiten. It is said that the precincts were originally large, about 200 m square, with a pond surrounding them. In 1911 (Meiji 44), it was merged into {{ill|lt=Kamo Shrine (Higashimiyoshi)|UNKNOWN|lt=Kamo Shrine}}; in 1922 (Taishō 11), local parishioners built a small shrine again at the present site.

It is an old shrine considered to correspond to the Shikinaisha Yokota Shrine. The ''{{ill|lt=Awa-shi|Q65291985|WD=Q65291985|1=Awa-shi}}'' states: "Yokota no Hokora is the Engishiki small shrine. Now abolished, it remains in Yokota, Kamo Village."

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ichikishimahime no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}

=== Access ===
* About 10 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Awa-Kamo Station|Q4829611|WD=Q4829611|1=Awa-Kamo Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Line|Q899310|WD=Q899310|1=Tokushima Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR Shikoku|Q496531|WD=Q496531|lt=JR|1=Shikoku Railway Company}}.

'''Yokota Shrine''' (よこたじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Higashimiyoshi|Q1206006|WD=Q1206006|1=Higashimiyoshi}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}.

=== History ===
The founding year is unknown.

According to Meiji-era shrine registers, it was also called Benzaiten. It is said that the precincts were originally large, about 200 m square, with a pond surrounding them. In 1911 (Meiji 44), it was merged into {{ill|lt=Kamo Shrine (Higashimiyoshi)|UNKNOWN|lt=Kamo Shrine}}; in 1922 (Taishō 11), local parishioners built a small shrine again at the present site.

It is an old shrine considered to correspond to the Shikinaisha Yokota Shrine. The ''{{ill|lt=Awa-shi|Q65291985|WD=Q65291985|1=Awa-shi}}'' states: "Yokota no Hokora is the Engishiki small shrine. Now abolished, it remains in Yokota, Kamo Village."

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ichikishimahime no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}

=== Access ===
* About 10 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Awa-Kamo Station|Q4829611|WD=Q4829611|1=Awa-Kamo Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Line|Q899310|WD=Q899310|1=Tokushima Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR Shikoku|Q496531|WD=Q496531|lt=JR|1=Shikoku Railway Company}}.
